title: SpaceX全股收购Cursor，联合构建有用AI
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Michael Truell
@mntruell
Lots to do together. Excited to be joining forces with @ SpaceX to build useful AI.
SpaceX
@SpaceX
12h
SpaceX has exercised the option to acquire @ cursor_ai in an all-stock transaction with the goal of building the world’s most useful AI models.
For the past few months, SpaceXAI has been jointly training a model with Cursor, which will be released in Cursor and Grok Build soon. Show more
1:22 PM · Jun 16, 2026 1.6M Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: SpaceX全股收购Cursor，联合构建有用AI
discovery_record.discovery_summary: SpaceX已行使期权，以全股交易收购Cursor，旨在打造全球最有用的AI模型。过去几个月，SpaceXAI与Cursor联合训练了一款模型，该模型将很快在Cursor和Grok Build中发布。主推文的Michael Truell表示期待合作，兴奋与SpaceX联手构建有用AI。

key_excerpts.text: SpaceX已行使期权，以全股交易收购Cursor，旨在打造全球最有用的AI模型。过去几个月，SpaceXAI与Cursor联合训练了一款模型，该模型将很快在Cursor和Grok Build中发布。主推文的Michael Truell表示期待合作，兴奋与SpaceX联手构建有用AI。
Post Log in Sign up Post Michael Truell @mntruell Lots to do together.
Excited to be joining forces with @ SpaceX to build useful AI.
SpaceX @SpaceX 12h SpaceX has exercised the option to acquire @ cursor_ai in an all-stock transaction with the goal of building the world’s most useful AI models.
For the past few months, SpaceXAI has been jointly training a model with Cursor, which will be released in Cursor and Grok Build soon.

company_actions: SpaceX已行使期权，以全股交易收购Cursor，旨在打造全球最有用的AI模型。过去几个月，SpaceXAI与Cursor联合训练了一款模型，该模型将很快在Cursor和Grok Build中发布。主推文的Michael Truell表示期待合作，兴奋与SpaceX联手构建有用AI。
Post Log in Sign up Post Michael Truell @mntruell Lots to do together.
Excited to be joining forces with @ SpaceX to build useful AI.
